ddls:
CREATE TABLE "foods" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "food_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food item */,
  "nutritional_info" TEXT /* Nutritional information of the food item */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the food item originates */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the food item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the food item is popular */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the food item image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the food item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the food item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foods_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foods_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foods_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item being translated */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the translation */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translated name of the food item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the translation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the translation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., fr for French) */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Native name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the food item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the food item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_versions_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the food item (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the food item (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item being recommended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
